utilitiesMasterList.Steam: Saturated steam for sterilization or process heating; may require condensate management and steam quality monitoring.
utilitiesMasterList.Vacuum: Vacuum system for pre-vacuum sterilizers or process evacuation; includes pumps, traps, and leak testing.
utilitiesMasterList.WFI: Water for Injection distribution loop; requires conductivity and microbial monitoring.
utilitiesMasterList.Compressed Air: Compressed air for pneumatic actuation; quality depends on filtration and dryers.
utilitiesMasterList.Instrument Air: Clean, dry air for instruments; typically higher quality than general compressed air.
utilitiesMasterList.Electricity: Mains electrical supply; may include single-phase or three-phase and UPS/backups.
utilitiesMasterList.Nitrogen: Inert gas supply for blanketing, purging, or instrument operation.
utilitiesMasterList.Cooling Water: Chilled or process cooling water for heat removal; quality and temperature control required.
utilitiesMasterList.Steam Condensate Return: Condensate handling and return systems associated with steam utilities.
utilitiesMasterList.Process Water (PW): Purified water for non-WFI process needs; may require conductivity and TOC monitoring.
utilitiesMasterList.CIP/SIP Utilities: Clean-in-place / steam-in-place connections and controls for sanitary equipment.
utilitiesMasterList.Ethernet/Network: Network connectivity for computerized control, data capture, and remote monitoring.
utilitiesMasterList.PLC/Control Power: Control power and PLC connectivity separate from main electrical supply.
utilitiesMasterList.Compressed Gas (Oxygen): Oxygen supply for specific processes; safety and purity considerations apply.
utilitiesMasterList.Compressed Gas (CO2): CO2 supply for process or packaging; purity and pressure control required.
utilitiesMasterList.Cooling Glycol: Closed-loop glycol cooling for temperature control where chilled water is not used.
utilitiesMasterList.Vacuum Steam Trap: Specialized steam trap and condensate handling for vacuum/sterilization systems
utilitiesMasterList.Helium: Helium supply for leak detection and helium-based leak testing.
utilitiesMasterList.WFI Sampling Ports: Dedicated sample ports for WFI microbial and conductivity sampling.
utilitiesMasterList.HEPA Filter Bank: HEPA filter banks and plenums for particle filtration; integrity testing and installation verification per ISO 14644.

utilityDescriptors.Steam: Primary sterilant; requires steam quality and condensate control.
utilityDescriptors.Vacuum: Pre-vacuum pump and leak testing required for air removal.
utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for controls, heaters, and pumps; consider UPS for critical cycles.
utilityDescriptors.Compressed Air: Actuation and pneumatic valves; instrument-quality air recommended.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Requires Bowie-Dick, thermocouple mapping, BI program; WFI only if integrated aeration sampling is present.

utilityDescriptors.Steam: Primary sterilant; gravity displacement relies on steam penetration.
utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for controls and instrumentation.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Less vacuum dependency than pre-vacuum units; steam quality monitoring recommended.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for controls and gas injection systems.
utilityDescriptors.WFI: Used for some aeration or cleaning steps; not always required.
utilityDescriptors.Compressed Air: Pneumatic actuation and gas handling support.
utilityDescriptors.Nitrogen: Purge gas for safe handling and process control.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Requires EtO monitoring, aeration verification, and residual testing per product type.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for conveyors, source handling, and control systems.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Dosimetry program and conveyor automation are common; facility-level shielding and QA required.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: High-power supply for accelerator and controls.
utilityDescriptors.Cooling Water: Critical for accelerator cooling and stability.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Requires dosimetry, accelerator maintenance schedule, and cooling system verification.

equipmentMetadata.equipmentType: Low Temperature Hydrogen Peroxide Plasma Sterilizer

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for plasma generation and controls.
utilityDescriptors.Compressed Air: Pneumatic actuation and gas handling support.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Material compatibility checks and aeration/residual verification required for product contact.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Primary power; backup power recommended for critical storage.
utilityDescriptors.Ethernet/Network: Temperature alarm, remote notification, and logging connectivity.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Continuous temperature logging and alarm verification required; PQ includes temperature excursion tests.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Stable power and backup recommended.
utilityDescriptors.Ethernet/Network: Remote monitoring and alarm notification for excursions.

equipmentMetadata.notes: PQ includes long-duration temperature stability and recovery tests.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for compressors and controls.
utilityDescriptors.Cooling Glycol: Chilled fluid for large-volume cooling systems.
utilityDescriptors.Ethernet/Network: Monitoring and logging for temperature control.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Airflow and door-seal integrity checks recommended for large chambers.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for alarms and monitoring.
utilityDescriptors.Nitrogen: LN2 supply for cryogenic storage; safety systems required.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Safety interlocks and oxygen-deficiency monitoring recommended.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for heating elements and controls.
utilityDescriptors.Compressed Air: Pneumatic actuation for sealing heads and conveyors.

equipmentMetadata.notes: OQ includes seal strength and temperature profiling; material-specific acceptance criteria apply.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for ultrasonic generator and controls.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Ultrasonic parameter validation and in-line inspection recommended.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for motors, heaters, and controls.
utilityDescriptors.Instrument Air: Clean air for sensitive pneumatic controls.
utilityDescriptors.Cooling Water: Cooling for sealing heads and motors.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Filler dosing accuracy, seal integrity, and in-line checkweigher tests are typical OQ/PQ items.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for forming, sealing, and conveyors.
utilityDescriptors.Cooling Water: Cooling for forming and sealing stations.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Vision inspection and seal integrity checks commonly included in OQ/PQ.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for applicators and conveyors.
utilityDescriptors.Ethernet/Network: Connectivity for serialization data and traceability systems.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Data integrity and serialization verification may be required for regulated products.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for balance electronics.
utilityDescriptors.Ethernet/Network: Optional connectivity for LIMS or data capture.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Calibration certificate collection and repeatability tests are standard OQ/PQ items.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for axes and control systems.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Environmental control and calibration across range required for PQ.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for environmental monitoring and data logging.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Calibration certificates and repeatability checks required.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for lighting and cameras.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Vision calibration and measurement uncertainty verification required.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for pumps, detectors, and autosampler.
utilityDescriptors.Ethernet/Network: Optional CDS connectivity for electronic records.

equipmentMetadata.notes: If CDS with electronic records present, CSV tests and audit trail verification required.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for detectors and control electronics.
utilityDescriptors.Ethernet/Network: Data capture and instrument control connectivity.
utilityDescriptors.Nitrogen: Carrier gas for GC; helium may be used for MS detectors per instrument specification.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Method suitability and detector performance verification required.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for lamp and detector systems.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Wavelength accuracy and stray light verification are typical OQ items.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for analyzer electronics.
utilityDescriptors.Process Water (PW): Reagent and rinse water quality may affect results.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Blank and calibration checks required during OQ/PQ.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for paddles and heaters.
utilityDescriptors.Process Water (PW): Water quality for dissolution media preparation.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Method validation and repeatability runs required for PQ.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for instrument and sample handling.
utilityDescriptors.Ethernet/Network: Connectivity for LIS integration and data capture.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Clinical sample runs and QC trending required for PQ.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for reagent handling and detectors.
utilityDescriptors.Ethernet/Network: Data connectivity for results and QC.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Reagent verification and clinical sample validation required.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for reader and display.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Simpler PQs focused on reader accuracy and connectivity.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for thermal cycler and optics.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Method validation and contamination control checks required.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for press and controls.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Tooling verification, process capability, and SPC checks required for PQ.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for spindles and controls.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Tooling verification and dimensional PQs required.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for robot axes and controllers.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Safety PLC verification, program baseline, and long-run PQ with safety monitoring required.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for torque tools and controllers.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Torque calibration and repeatability tests required.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for cameras and lighting.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Calibration targets and detection performance verification required.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for X-ray source and detectors.
utilityDescriptors.Helium: Optional for helium leak detection integration.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Radiation safety, imaging calibration, and detection sensitivity PQs required.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for pumps and gauges.
utilityDescriptors.Helium: Used for helium-based leak detection where applicable.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Leak rate verification and calibration required.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for detector and vacuum systems.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Calibration and sensitivity verification required.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for pumps and controls.
utilityDescriptors.CIP/SIP Utilities: Connections for cleaning and sterilization cycles.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Validated cycles and residual detergent checks required.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for ultrasonic generator.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Detergent concentration and cleaning efficacy verification required.

utilityDescriptors.Process Water (PW): Water and detergent supply for manual cleaning.

equipmentMetadata.notes: SOP adherence and cleaning validation required.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for ultrasonic generator and controls.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Weld strength and parameter validation required.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for heaters and controls.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Parameter validation and pull tests required for PQ.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for dispensers and ovens.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Dispense accuracy and cure profile verification required.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for crimping heads and controls.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Crimp force and dimensional checks required.

equipmentMetadata.equipmentType: HVAC Air Handling Unit serving cleanrooms

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for fans, dampers, and controls.
utilityDescriptors.HEPA Filter Bank: HEPA filter banks and plenums for particle control.
utilityDescriptors.Steam Condensate Return: Steam trap and condensate handling for humidification systems.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Airflow, pressure cascade, HEPA integrity, and particle mapping are critical OQ/PQ items.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for monitoring and differential pressure sensors.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Filter integrity testing and installation verification required.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for pumps and UV/TOC systems.
utilityDescriptors.WFI: Water for Injection distribution where applicable.
utilityDescriptors.WFI Sampling Ports: Dedicated ports for microbial and conductivity sampling.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Loop integrity, conductivity, and microbial challenge/recovery tests required for PQ.

utilityDescriptors.Electricity: Power for compressors and dryers.
utilityDescriptors.Instrument Air: Filtered, dried air for instrument use.

equipmentMetadata.notes: Dew point, particle, and oil content verification required for instrument-grade air.
